news.summary: Standard Chartered and OKX are launching a pilot program allowing institutions to use crypto assets and tokenized money market funds (MMFs) as collateral. The program, under regulatory oversight in Dubai, involves custody with Standard Chartered in the Dubai International Financial Centre. OKX clients will access assets from Franklin Templeton's digital assets team. Franklin Templeton and Brevan Howard Digital are among the first to trial the capability. By enabling collateral usage, the lender guarantees loan repayment despite digital assets' volatility. Standard Chartered's head of financing and securities services believes this collaboration will enhance institutional confidence and efficiency in the digital asset ecosystem, promoting trust and regulatory compliance. Brevan Howard sees the program as a positive step in crypto industry institutionalization and innovation. This collaborative effort aims to push the evolution of the global crypto ecosystem.
news.headline: Standard Chartered & OKX pilot program with institutions using crypto assets & MMFs as collateral, enhancing security.

news.summary: The stock of Palo Alto saw a decline following reports suggesting the cybersecurity company's potential acquisition of artificial intelligence startup ProtectAI for approximately $650 million. Speculation rises as to whether this AI startup will be the next addition to Palo Alto Networks' acquisition strategy.
news.headline: Palo Alto Networks may acquire AI startup ProtectAI for $650 million, causing stock dip.

news.summary: On Thursday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a steep decline of 900 points following an unexpected Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation report. This led to sell-offs of shares in Nvidia and Tesla on the stock market today. The sudden drop in the Dow Jones was heavily influenced by the surprising inflation data released. This information was reported in an article titled "Dow Jones Plunges 900 Points After Surprise Inflation Report; Nvidia, Tesla Sell Off" by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Dow Jones drops 900 points due to surprise inflation report; Nvidia, Tesla stocks decline.

news.summary: Today, the stock market saw a resurgence of sellers, with banks experiencing a significant decline in anticipation of upcoming earnings reports on Friday. Despite this, Walmart maintained a strong performance. The Nasdaq index was down by 3% early in the day, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average plummeted by 850 points. Banks faltered, but Walmart continued to lead in the market.
news.headline: Stock market sees Nasdaq down 3% and Dow Jones down 850 points; banks drop but Walmart performs well.
US Agriculture Sec. Rollins: I will visit India and Brazil in the coming months.

This partnership signifies a significant development for both companies as they aim to enhance their services and expand their reach in the market.

news.summary: A recent survey conducted independently has revealed that female franchise owners express great satisfaction with the performance of MY SALON Suite®, a salon suite franchise based in Carrollton, Texas. This survey, carried out on April 10, 2025, highlighted that the women involved are highly content with the opportunities and support provided by the franchise. MY SALON Suite® offers a unique personal space for beauty, health, and wellness professionals to establish their businesses. The positive response from these female entrepreneurs underscores the effectiveness of the franchise model.
news.headline: MY SALON Suite® named top 100 franchise for women by Franchise Business Review. Female owners highly satisfied. (Characters: 109)

news.summary: U.S. stocks saw a significant surge in early trading following positive signals from President Trump regarding progress on trade deals, calming global trade disruption concerns from recent tariff announcements. The S&P 500 index jumped 3%, recovering some of its 10% losses from the previous four sessions. The tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 outperformed other indices, rising 3.4%, while the Dow Jones rose by 3% and the S&P 500 by 3%. The Russell 2000 also saw an increase of 2.7%. Investors returned to financials, tech, and consumer discretionary sectors on Tuesday, with semiconductors notably rallying 4.5%. Financial Select Sector SPDR Fund rose by 4.0%, Technology Select Sector SPDR Fund by 3.8%, and Consumer Discretionary Select Sector SPDR Fund by 3.0%. Communication Services, Health Care, Industrials, and Energy sectors also saw positive gains. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Wall Street soars as Trump hints at trade deals, adding over $500 billion in market value. Major indices climb: Nasdaq +3.4%, Dow Jones +3.0%, S&P 500 +3.0%. Tech sector leads gains.
US Agriculture Sec. Rollins: We will see adjustments in markets as we move forward.

news.summary: Charles Hoskinson, co-founder of Cardano and Ethereum, predicts Bitcoin could reach $250,000 by the end of this year or next. He cited regulatory progress and potential adoption by major tech companies as factors for digital asset growth. Despite recent volatility due to global tariff policy changes, Hoskinson expects market stabilization and increased liquidity with easing monetary policy. He anticipates the markets will adjust to a "new normal" and continue growing. Full details on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bitcoin could reach $250,000, predicts Cardano co-founder. Hoskinson cites regulatory progress and tech adoption as catalysts.

Shareholders and interested parties are encouraged to participate and gain valuable information about the company's position in the market.

news.summary: U-Store, a self-storage business established in 1975 by partners Harry S. Sellers, a former U.S. Navy officer, and Bernard Fensterwald Jr., a DC Attorney, is celebrating its 50th anniversary in 2025. The family-owned company, with a history of five decades, has reached this milestone with pride.
news.headline: U-Store marks 50 years in self-storage business, established in 1975 by Harry S. Sellers and Bernard Fensterwald Jr.

news.summary: A significant investment of $25 million has been made by Leviton in its Network Solutions Fuquay-Varina, N.C. fiber optic cable manufacturing plant to expand its size. Today, Leviton's Network Solutions Business Unit disclosed the completion of the expansion project, showcasing a doubling in size due to the substantial financial commitment. This move marks a notable development for the company, highlighting its dedication to enhancing its manufacturing capabilities and potentially increasing its production output in the fiber optic cable sector.
news.headline: Leviton's Fiber Factory in N.C. doubled in size after $25 million investment. Expansion project completed. BOTHELL, Wash.

news.summary: Avalara has been recognized as a Trusted Seller on TrustRadius, emphasizing their commitment to offering up-to-date product details and impartial evaluations. The acknowledgment signifies Avalara's dedication to transparency in its tax compliance automation software for businesses. The news was announced on April 10, 2025 in Durham, N.C.
news.headline: Avalara receives Trusted Seller verification from TrustRadius for providing accurate product info and unbiased reviews.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Northbrook, Illinois, Hilco Real Estate, LLC revealed that the bid deadline for two renowned assisted living facilities has been set for June 12, 2025. The properties up for sale are The Courte at Citrus Heights in Citrus Heights, California, and The Landing on Dundee in Wheeling, Illinois. Interested parties have until the specified date to submit their bids for these well-established facilities.
news.headline: Hilco Real Estate is selling two premier assisted living facilities: The Courte at Citrus Heights in CA and The Landing on Dundee in IL, with a bid deadline set for June 12, 2025.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Cleveland, GenomOncology unveiled BioMCP, a cutting-edge open-source tool designed to facilitate AI access to specialized medical data. This new technology enables advanced search functionality and complete text retrieval from clinical trials and genetic sources.
news.headline: GenomOncology unveils BioMCP, an open-source technology for AI to access medical data, launching on April 10, 2025.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 10, 2025, an inventor from Byford, WA, Australia shared about a breakthrough innovation. The inventor emphasized the paramount importance of time in emergency response operations. Thus, the inventor created the QUICKCUT TAC CARRIER to address this need efficiently. This invention aims to provide swift access to a quick cut saw during prolonged and critical emergency tasks. The inventor's ingenuity from Australia showcases the global reach of innovative solutions.
news.headline: Inventor from Australia creates QUICKCUT TAC CARRIER to carry quick cut saw for emergency response jobs.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025 in Pittsburgh, two inventors from West Los Angeles, California presented a new plumbing fixture aimed at preventing sewage blockages. The NO CLOG DRAIN was created to alleviate the need for costly plumbing repairs. This innovative design is projected to significantly reduce the number of clogged drains and associated maintenance costs. The inventors hope that this product will revolutionize the plumbing industry and bring about lasting benefits for households.
news.headline: InventHelp inventors create NO CLOG DRAIN to prevent sewer blockages, based in West Los Angeles, California.

news.summary: Today, a leading organization that provides Service Dogs for Veterans suffering from PTSD, TBI, and military sexual trauma played a key role in shaping legislation. In Washington on April 10, 2025, Senator Thom Tillis (R-NC), Senator Richard Blumenthal (D-CT), and a bipartisan group were involved in this effort.
news.headline: K9s for Warriors backs legislation aiding Veterans with PTSD, TBI, military trauma; Senators Tillis, Blumenthal involved.

news.summary: Alireza Khatami's film, which gained recognition at the Sundance 2025 festival, won the Directing Award in the World Cinema Dramatic Section. The award was received in Los Angeles on April 10, 2025. Cineverse, a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CNVS, in partnership with Fandor, unveiled important news today.

news.summary: Unocoin, India's top cryptocurrency exchange, has recently revealed their collaboration with Voltage, the pioneering Lightning payments provider, to integrate the Lightning Network. This enhancement will offer customers the quickest and most cost-effective Bitcoin transactions. The partnership was officially announced on April 10, 2025, in Austin, Texas.
news.headline: Unocoin in India implements Lightning Network in partnership with Voltage for instant Bitcoin payments.

news.summary: Entrepreneur and philanthropist Parker H. "Pete" Petit recently issued a caution to business executives and entrepreneurs on the increasing legal challenges faced by today's public company leaders. Petit, known for his extensive experience in both entrepreneurship and as a public company CEO, highlighted the need for readiness in facing these challenges. The warning comes amidst a rising number of legal hurdles confronting executives, emphasizing the importance of proactive measures in dealing with such issues. The statement was released in Atlanta on April 10, 2025, underscoring the need for vigilance and preparedness in navigating the evolving legal landscape for public companies.
news.headline: Pete Petit issues warnings to business leaders in book on legal challenges ahead.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, the US Ablation Technology Market is expected to grow significantly from US$2.44 billion in 2025 to US$3.87 billion by 2030, representing a compound annual growth rate of 9.6%. The market's expansion is attributed to the introduction of advanced technologies like PFA.
news.headline: US Ablation Technology Market to reach $3.87 billion by 2030 from $2.44 billion in 2025, growing at 9.6% CAGR.

news.summary: Registration for bbcon 2025, the annual conference hosted by Blackbaud (NASDAQ: BLKB), a top software provider for social impact, is now available. Early bird pricing is offered until July 8th, for the event scheduled from October 6th to 8th.
news.headline: Blackbaud announces bbcon 2025 registration open with early bird pricing until July 8 for the October 6-8 conference.

news.summary: Hexnode, the enterprise software division of Mitsogo Inc., has introduced Hexnode UEM MSP, a specialized solution created to provide Managed Service Providers (MSPs) with enhanced device management features for multi-tenant setups. This recent release reinforces Hexnode's dedication to assisting MSPs and improving their capacity to oversee client devices efficiently. As part of the Hexnode MSP partner program, the new Hexnode UEM MSP aims to equip MSPs with advanced tools for remote device management, demonstrating a commitment to the success of MSPs in managing multiple clients seamlessly.
news.headline: Hexnode launches Hexnode UEM MSP to empower Managed Service Providers with advanced device management capabilities across multi-tenant environments in their partner program, reaffirming commitment to supporting MSPs.

news.summary: An eVTOL aircraft manufacturer based in Japan, SkyDrive Inc., recently achieved a significant milestone by successfully conducting a demo flight of their "SkyDrive SD-05 model" on April 9th, 2025, during the Media Day event at Expo 2025 Osaka, Kansai. The company also shared recent test flight footage and development updates from their facilities located in Toyota City, Aichi Prefecture. Interested individuals can view the released content on YouTube using the following URL: https://www.yo.
news.headline: SkyDrive showcases SKYDRIVE SD-05 eVTOL aircraft at Osaka-Kansai Expo, April 9, 2025 - demo flight successful.

news.summary: WASHINGTON, April 15 marks National Laundry Day, coinciding with Tax Day. The American Cleaning Institute reveals that 80% of Americans favor cleaning over doing taxes. Highlighting the significance of laundry, a recent survey by Wakefield Research indicates that 47% of participants prioritize laundry as a means to maintain health. Doing laundry not only aids in cleanliness but also plays a crucial role in reducing allergens, as per the survey findings.
news.headline: April 15 is not just Tax Day, but also National Laundry Day, with 80% preferring cleaning over taxes. 47% see laundry as crucial for staying healthy.
